content.full_text:
I
Re
Fern Por-rrtcal PRACTICEs CouulsSIoN
428 J Street o Suite 620 . Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 . Fax (916) 322'0886
February 14,2006
Daniel J. McHugh, City Attomey
City of Redlands
Office of the City Attorney
P.O. Box 3005
Redlands, CA 92373-1 505
Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-182
Dear Mr. McHugh
This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the conflict-of-
interest provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").l The Act requires the
Commission to provide written advice to any person whose duties under the Act are in
question or to that person's authorized representative. (Section 831la@); regulation
I8329(a) - copy enclosed.) However, the Commission may decline to provide written
advice where the requestor is seeking advice that requires us to evaluate conduct that has
already occurred. (Regulation 1 83 29(b)(8XA) and (cXa)(A).)
Formal written advice is the application of law to a given set of facts provided by
the requestor and has the putpose of conferring immunity to the requestor. (Section
831 14; regulation 18329(b)(7).) After a careful review of the facts giving rise to your
question, we decline to provide written advice to you. Your current question concerns an
anticipated governmental action that is inextricably involved with a goveflrmental action
that has already taken place and in which the advisee, Councilmember Patricia Gilbreath,
has already participated. Therefore, issuing advice at this time would relate to past
conduct and, therefore, would not further the impartial, effective administration of the
Act so mandated by section 831 1 1.
I Gorrernment Code sections 8 1000 - 91 0 14. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections
I 8 I 09 - 18997 , of the California Code of Regulations.


I
File No. W-05-182
Page No. 2
Please note that our decision is not a determination of the questions posed in your
request. In addition, nothing in the Act prevents an official from seeking legal advice
from you or private counsel.
If you have any other questions regarding this matter,please contact me at (916)
322-s660.
Sincerely,
Luisa Menchaca
General
Andreas C. Rockas
Counsel, Legal Division
Enclosure
